response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility across languages (including Python, JavaScript, C, C++, D), and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth frameworks at enterprise scale — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, C, C++, and D across distributed systems
Proven ability to build and ship scalable infrastructure (e.g., GISCollective, real-time data systems at Dunnhumby)
Strong technical leadership demonstrated through mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or growth measurement systems
Limited visibility into AI tooling usage to accelerate engineering velocity, a preferred qualification
Experience with telemetry and statistical analysis is implied but not explicitly documented or quantified
